USAGE:
    ccvarn parse [MAIN_OUTPUT] [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    ccvarn parse ccvarn.json
    ccvarn parse stdout
    ccvarn parse stderr
    ccvarn parse ccvarn.json --output ReleaseNotes.md --output ReleaseNotes.txt
    ccvarn parse --output ReleaseNotes.md --output ReleaseNotes.txt

ARGUMENTS:
    [MAIN_OUTPUT]    The main output file to store the asserted information     
                     (defaults to CCVARN.json).                                 
                     May also be stdout for outputting to standard output       
                     stream, and stderr to output to error stream               

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                    Prints help information                       
    -r, --root                    The path to the repository root to parse the  
                                  commits for                                   
        --output <OUTPUT_PATH>    Additional outputs for outputting changelogs. 
                                  Output type is based on the file extension    
                                  (Markdown and plain text currently supported) 
        --exclude-headers         This allows disabling the output of the       
                                  version header when generating release notes  
        --tag [TAG_NAME]          This allows overriding the tage name specified
                                  in the configuration file when calling the    
                                  tool

                                  version header when generating release notes
